summary: Frontend-only validation of 5 follow-up tasks (momentum CTAs, pricing single source of truth, data-testids, telemetry 401 silence, Landing.js split). All 8 acceptance criteria from review request verified via Playwright + source inspection on the preview URL. No blocking issues found.

design_issues.screen: /offers Custom Quantity modal — Volume discounts table
issues: Tier unit prices render as '5€, 4.5€, 4€, 3.5€, 3€' (Number->String coercion drops trailing zeros) instead of the spec format '5.00€, 4.50€, 4.00€, 3.50€, 3.00€'. Offers.js line 429: `{tier.unit}€` should use `{tier.unit.toFixed(2)}€` for consistency with the rest of the UI (unit prices elsewhere correctly show 2 decimals). Cosmetic-only; values are numerically correct.

action_items: OPTIONAL cosmetic: In frontend/src/pages/Offers.js line 429, change `{tier.unit}€` to `{tier.unit.toFixed(2)}€` to match the spec's '5.00€ / 4.50€ / 4.00€ / 3.50€ / 3.00€' display format in the Volume discounts grid.
critical_code_review_comments: pricing.js is a clean single source of truth; Landing and Offers both import PACKS, LANDING_PACK_IDS / OFFERS_PACK_IDS and VOLUME_TIERS — no drift between the two pages (5€/12€/20€/35€ and unit prices 5.00/4.00/3.50 match).
Landing.js is now 493 lines (down from 632); FeaturesSection/PricingSection/FAQSection are properly extracted under /components/landing/ and imported.

telemetryService.js: 401 console noise correctly silenced via `if (resp.status !== 401) console.warn(...)` on both init and renew paths. The 'Init error: TypeError: Failed to fetch' still appears on some networks — this is a different code path (catch block line 91) and not in the task scope.

index.css: .btn-primary transition uses cubic-bezier(.34, 1.56, .64, 1) with translateY(-2px) scale(1.015) on hover and translateY(1px) scale(0.97) on :active — matches the 'momentum / slight overshoot' spec exactly. Verified via getComputedStyle: `transform 0.26s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1)`.

Reveal.js: desktop path uses type:'spring' stiffness 90 damping 18 mass 0.9 for Reveal and stiffness 95 damping 17 mass 0.85 for StaggerItem — spring momentum confirmed. Mobile path intentionally simplifies to opacity-only to avoid jank (good choice).
Footer.js legal links all carry data-testid: footer-link-legal-notice / terms / privacy / refund — all four verified present in DOM.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Lenis is fully removed — native CSS scroll. All pricing goes through frontend/src/constants/pricing.js. The only observation was cosmetic: Volume tiers in /offers custom modal render as '5€' instead of '5.00€' because {tier.unit}€ doesn't pin decimals. Non-blocking.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bug found. All 5 follow-up tasks validated as delivered.
